title: Shot Glass Measuring Cup 3 Ounce/90ML Liquid Heavy High Espresso Glass Cup Black Line
description:
About this item
[EASY TO READE]Easily measure and transport smaller amounts without them spilling; steadier than using measuring spoons; perfect for kitchen, home, lawn, and garden
[MULTI-PURPOSE LIQUID ]Dry 3OZ/90ML measures dry and liquid ingredients for creating balanced recipes, mixing delicious beverages, making craft cocktails, and more
[HEAVYWEIGHT GLASS] allows clear view of contents for more control and accuracy; weighted base helps reduce tipping for less mess
[THICK and DURABLE] The Thick, Durable Sham provides stability, this measuring glass is perfectly balanced to sit safely on bar or kitchen counters as you delegate the necessary ingredients.
WARNING NOTE! ! When you receive measuring glass is broken， Please contact us immediately. We will immediately We will help you solve the problem.
reviews_5s:
I really love the size of the shot glass. I love the measurements on it. I love the price, I love the Customer Service. The only thing that you need to know is do not put it in the dishwasher. The labeling will wear off. That should go without saying though because even Pyrex doesn’t stand up to the dishwasher. That being said I 100% recommend - it’s my favorite shot glass we’ve ordered. Big enough to do a few mixed drinks at a time and small enough to be what it is - a shot glass!This product delivers great quality and value. It’s easy to use, performs as advertised, and meets expectations. Highly recommend it for anyone seeking reliability and efficiency in their purchase.This is a thick glass measuring cup with ounce and milliliter markings for drinks. The labeling is very clear and the markings are each printed on tie sides.This is actually much better quality than what I expected. Sturdy and nice-looking.Thickness of jar very good not easy to break and the Visibility of measuring markings do not wash off... highly recommend this productThis measuring vessel and I called it a vessel because it is more than a step above the rest. First of all this precious vessel arrives in packaging that I think would be impervious to a bomb blast. It comes in a nice box and it is sheathed on all sides by some kind of flexible foam type material. The it is wrapped in a lite sheet of tissue paper. And place in a cutout specific to it’s shaped. They had my business for future orders after that because when they care that much about a satisfied customer on the other end it just speaks volumes to me.
This vessel has very easily read measurements in ounces and milliliters. I’m not sure about dishwasher safe I just don’t remember what it said. But personally we never do anything but a hand wash on anything with measurements. And the real kicker is the spout. It comes more sharply to a point making for precision pouring than measuring “cups”.
Get it!! You’ll love it. It will carry you through measuring children’s medication that’s dispensed in ML to measuring for cocktails. Both extremely important not of equal importance I feel like I should say 😉😉I have impaired vision and for some reason most all of the measuring cups come with numbers marked in RED which is harder for me to read.

I needed a small one to measure half ounces. Delighted to find this one printed w/black.

This is a quality item -heavier weight glass and blessedly black numbers.
Thank you~!Wanted to pour test myself to make sure I’m still on point and didn’t want to spend $80 on an exact o pour. This works great and I’m still 100% accurate on pouring liquor.We had been looking online for a few days, and the prices were ridiculously high (on "bar supply" sites). We wanted a good quality glass measuring cup for our bar. Decided to give amazon a try when we came across this one. It is good quality, it's easy to read, made of glass. Measures ounces and ML.

The only drawback is the fact that it doesn't have a V-nozzle/pourer. The liquid can drip down the side if you pour too slowly. But, we aren't big drinkers, so it's not a big deal for us. One or two drinks a week.Came quickly and I was very happy with my purchase
reviews_1s:
The measurements marks do not read the same from one side to the other. Nor are they accurate measurements by volume. Also having measurements on all sides of the glass it makes it hard to read.Put the shot glass into the dishwasher once and all the numbers came off. I did this after the "return period" and Amazon refuses to allow me to send it back.After only a year of occasional use all the printing on the glass completely wore off making it useless.The numbers have almost completely worn off in a year and a half. I don't own a dishwasher, so you can't blame that.I ordered this a couple months ago. It was fine to use until the next couple washes. Now I can’t read any of the measurements anymore because it washed off. I would invest in a better quality one. Waste of money.All measurement markings and labeling disappeared after 5 or 6 rides in the dishwasher. No longer useful as a measuring device. Would not buy again.My mother always said wash everything from the stor
so when I did It erased almost all the measurements, forcing me two use a magic marker. Next time I'm just going to get a Flintstone jamjar, jar or or one of those glass jars that Salted beef comes in to make s o s ( stuff on a shingle) with. We were poor growing up and mother used to make SOS by the pot full with a loaf of toasted bread too late. Allowed the milky salty goodyes on.Markings wash off. Doesn't matter if you wash by hand or use the dishwasher. I have never had this problem with any other graduated measuring cups. I have had 2 Pyrex measuring cups for over 15 years and they still have their lines with no fading - this is in response to the reviewer who claimed it happens with Pyrex too. The glass appears to be good, but I bought it for the graduated lines. Useless after one cleaning.The product shows black writing on the glass in the advertisement . That is not at all what showed up. The numbers are almost invisible. I will be returning asap.This item doesn't deserve one star. Markings starting coming off the first time I put it in the dishwasher. After several washes there are no markings left, so it has become useless.
